note: Aliases: image, img. 'src' is required (alias 'path'). Image source resolved via ImageSource — accepts file path, URL, data-URI, or raw bytes. SVGs auto-generate a PNG fallback.

fallback.description: optional PNG fallback for SVG sources. When omitted, a 1x1 transparent PNG is generated.

id.description: OOXML shape id; source of the @id in the stable path /picture[@id=ID].

behindText.description: true when the picture floats behind text (anchor @behindDoc=1).

hPosition.description: absolute horizontal anchor position in cm (positionH/posOffset).

hRelative.description: horizontal anchor reference frame (e.g. page, margin, column, character).
